title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For One Side Headache
description: Zingiber officinale tinctures contains gingerols and shogaols as its bioactive constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce pain and swelling associated with headaches. Gingerols and shogaols also have natural analgesic properties, which can help ease pain on one side of the head. They work by blocking the production of pain-causing chemicals in the body and by increasing blood flow to the affected area. By reducing inflammation and pain, Zingibe...
